title: Lead Project Engineer — Nuclear Decommissioning
description_raw:
Altrad Babcock are recruiting a Lead Project Engineer to support the Dounreay nuclear decommissioning programme. This is a contract role engaged outside IR35.

The Lead Project Engineer will take technical ownership of the mechanical decommissioning work packages within the Dounreay Materials Test Reactor (DMTR) facility, working under NDA and DSRL governance.

Key responsibilities:
- Lead the mechanical engineering input for nuclear decommissioning work packages
- Produce and review work package instructions (WPIs) for mechanical plant removal
- Act as technical authority for decommissioning of reactor mechanical systems (pumps, heat exchangers, pipework)
- Manage radiation work permits (RWPs) and ALARP demonstrations
- Interface with independent safety assessors and the regulator (ONR)
- Track project milestones and report to the programme manager

Profile:
- Degree in mechanical engineering; Chartered Engineer (IMechE) preferred
- 8+ years nuclear mechanical engineering
- Experience with nuclear decommissioning and waste management preferred
- DV or SC clearance required

Rate: £650–£700/day outside IR35
Duration: 18 months
Start: October 2026
Location: Dounreay site, Caithness (fully on-site)
